stemHtml: Between two aircraft of the same type, the newer aircraft A gets bigger winglets installed than aircraft B. What is the effect on induced drag for aircraft A when leaving ground effect?

options.a: Aircraft A is MORE affected by the change of induced drag compared to Aircraft B as bigger winglets INCREASE wingtip vortices.
options.b: The difference in winglet size does not affect the impact of ground effect.
options.c: Aircraft A is LESS affected by the change of induced drag compared to Aircraft B as bigger winglets REDUCE wingtip vortices.
options.d: Neither aircraft will experience ground effect as the presence of any winglets stop it completely.
